properties.text: Harvest report Block 2: Yield = 20.3 q/ha (152.3q from 7.5ha). Excellent quality, good grain fill. Similar to last year (23.1 q/ha).. Sold 122.8q @ Rs.3374/q.
Harvest report Block 2: Yield = 41.6 q/ha (312.2q from 7.5ha). Excellent quality, good grain fill. Similar to last year (41.9 q/ha).. Sold 254.8q @ Rs.3114/q.
Harvest report Block 2: Yield = 33.3 q/ha (250.1q from 7.5ha). Grade A quality - expecting good price. Similar to last year (36.2 q/ha).. Sold 215.8q @ Rs.1657/q.
Harvest report Block 2: Yield = 30.6 q/ha (229.6q from 7.5ha). Mixed quality - some sections affected by disease. Similar to last year (31.0 q/ha).. Sold 165.0q @ Rs.1660/q.
Harvested Maize from Block 2 today. Got about 238.0 quintals from 7.5 ha (31.7 q/ha). Quality below average - pest damage visible. Similar to last year (32.7 q/ha).
Block 2 harvest done - Maize: 286.6q total, 38.2 q/ha. Mixed quality - some sections affected by disease. Stored in godown. Similar to last year (37.1 q/ha).
Harvested Maize from Block 2 today. Got about 315.8 quintals from 7.5 ha (42.1 q/ha). Grade A quality - expecting good price. Similar to last year (42.8 q/ha).
